name: Support subscription renewal policy example
answer:
Customers may renew annual plans through account billing settings up to 30 days before expiration.
Customers may renew annual plans up to 90 days after expiration.
Support automatically renews every plan without customer confirmation.

sources.title: Support Subscription Renewal Policy
sources.content:
Customers may renew annual plans through account billing settings up to 30 days before expiration.
Customers must contact support to request a renewal after expiration.
Renewal requires customer confirmation before the next billing period.
